title: Tracking: IEEE 1800-2023 support
body:
| Subclause | Title                                                | [sv-tests](https://chipsalliance.github.io/sv-tests-results/) | Issues | PRs          |
|-----------|------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|--------|--------------|
| 6.5       | Nets and variables                                   | Partially Supported                                           | #5052  |              |
| 6.6.4     | Trireg net                                           | Unsupported                                                   |        |              |
| 6.6.7     | User-defined nettypes                                | Unsupported                                                   |        |              |
| 6.6.8     | Generic interconnect                                 | Unsupported                                                   |        |              |
| 7.2.2     | Assigning to structures                              | Partially Supported                                           | #3826  |              |
| 7.3.2     | Tagged unions                                        | Unsupported                                                   |        | #6869 #6881 #6943         |
| 8.26.6.1  | Method name conflict resolution                      | Partially Supported                                           | #4819  |              |
| 8.26.6.2  | Parameter and type declaration inheritance conflicts | Partially Supported                                           | #4819  |              |
| 8.26.6.3  | Diamond relationship                                 | Partially Supported                                           | #4819  |              |
| 9.4.2.4   | Sequence events                                      | Unsupported                                                   | #4425  |              |
| 9.4.5     | Intra-assignment timing controls                     | Partially Supported                                           | #3711  |              |
| 10.3.4    | Continuous assignment strengths                      | Partially Supported                                           |        | #3601 #3629  |
| 10.6.1  | The assign and deassign procedural statements        | Unsupported [^1]                                                  | #1120  |              |
| 11.4.5    | Equality operators                                   | Partially Supported                                           |        |              |
| 11.4.6    | Wildcard equality operators                          | Partially Supported                                           | #5673  |              |
| 11.4.14.4 | Streaming dynamically sized data                     | Partially Supported                                           | #5830  |              |
| 11.9      | Tagged union expressions and member access           | Unsupported                                                   |        |  #6943            |
| 12.6.1    | Pattern matching in case statements                  | Unsupported                                                   |        |   #6943       |
| 12.6.2    | Pattern matching in if statements                    | Unsupported                                                   |        |     #6943  |
| 12.6.3    | Pattern matching in conditional expressions          | Unsupported                                                   |        |              |
| 15.5      | Named events                                         | Partially Supported                                           | #6829  |              |
| 16.7      | Sequences                                            | Unsupported                                                   | #4425  |              |
| 16.9      | Sequence operations                                  | Unsupported                                                   | #4425  |              |
| 16.10     | Local variables                                      | Unsupported                                                   | #4425  |              |
| 16.17     | Expect statement                                     | Unsupported                                                   |        |              |
| 18.7      | Inline constraints—randomize() with                  | Partially Supported                                           | #4706  |              |
| 18.17.7   | Value passing between productions                    | Partially Supported                                           | #6131  |              |
| 20.14     | Probabilistic distribution functions                 | Partially Supported[^1]                                           |        |              |

[^1]: Unsupported or partially supported features are those which IEEE is considering deprecating.
